concerns.description: Fidelity Content evaluation failed — dimension not assessed
concerns.analysis: The content fidelity call did not produce valid results after retries. The document was not evaluated on this dimension.

The reading order of the output is fundamentally broken. The conversion starts with content from page 21 of the 31-page source PDF. The first 20 pages of the document, which contain the primary cover letter, certificate of service, and the first several rule petitions, are completely omitted from the main sequence and placed at the end of the JSON as '[Pages 1-11 unavailable]' and '[Pages 11-21 unavailable]' placeholders. This materially disrupts the logical flow and organizational structure int
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The document begins on page 1 with 'Collision Service Investigators of North Carolina'.
concerns.output_quote: The JSON output begins with Section 1: 'Recommended Adoption “North Carolina Anti-Steering Law”' (content from PDF page 21).

concerns.analysis: The HTML output fails to render the first 21 pages of the 30-page source PDF. The document instead starts at page 21 and appends error messages at the bottom stating that content from pages 1-11 and 11-21 is 'unavailable'. This is a complete failure of the visual organization and layout, as over two-thirds of the document is missing, preventing a user from finding information in the expected flow of the document.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The entire content from page 1 to page 21 of the source PDF, including the initial letter, certificate of service, and several petition sections.
concerns.output_quote: "[Pages 1-11 unavailable] Content from pages 1-11 could not be converted. This section may be available after retry." and "[Pages 11-21 unavailable] Content from pages 11-21 could not be converted."
concerns.location: Full document flow; error markers at bottom of HTML screenshot.

concerns.analysis: The source PDF contains several meaningful images that are essential to the document's content: a company logo and a 'RECEIVED' date stamp on page 1, and two photographs of a damaged vehicle on page 9 illustrating repair estimate issues. Because the HTML failed to convert the first 21 pages, all of these meaningful images are missing from the output.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Collision Service Investigators logo and 'RECEIVED' stamp on page 1; two photographs of SUV rear-quarter panel damage on page 9 (captioned 'Example Seen outside damage' and 'Supplement of Record 2').
concerns.output_quote: The images are absent from the HTML; the entire section for these pages is replaced by error text.

concerns.analysis: While most lists in the later sections are correctly identified, a numbered list on PDF page 22 (items 1 through 4 under section (b)) was flattened into individual paragraphs in the JSON output, losing its structural list identity. This is a minor defect as the numbering text is preserved, but the semantic structure is lost.
concerns.source_pdf_quote:
(No amendment) (1) Loss and claim payments shall be mailed...
(No amendment) (2) Unless the insured consents...
(No amendment) (3) No insurer shall withhold...
(No amendment) (4) If a release...
concerns.output_quote: These items are represented as separate 'type': 'paragraph' elements within Section 2 instead of as items within a single list element.
